request: You are R7. Review only this evidence summary from local files: OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN includes P2-12 install/new-PC equivalence and implementation order; OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS includes lifecycle cleanup, task finish-gate integrity, memory lifecycle/compounding hygiene, data safety, and fresh-PC install conditions; SYNC_POLICY defines git_sync dry-run classifier and auto_sync bounded writer; VERIFICATION defines task:lifecycle, task:lifecycle:settle, review:settle, hooks:data:verify, verify:codex-loop. Decide if this is adequate as a completion plan for node lifecycle cleanup, task finish-gate integrity, merge/hold/demote/delete/provenance review, policy-gated GitHub data push, and recovery safety. Return exactly: reviewer_id=R7; verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED; blocking_objections=[...]; required_doc_changes=[...]; evidence_files=[...].
